question: What is the id and type code for the template used by the most documents?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.template_id ,  T2.Template_Type_Code FROM Documents AS T1 JOIN Templates AS T2 ON T1.template_id  =  T2.template_id GROUP BY T1.template_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_1, T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_3 GROUP BY T1.col_1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_1, T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_3 GROUP BY T1.col_1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
